pi_items.source: Inspected data/docker-compose.yml which defines exactly 5 services (vote, result, worker, redis, db) that will run as 5 containers.
Inspected data/docker-compose.yml which explicitly lists these 5 service names under the 'services' key.
Inspected data/docker-compose.yml which maps host port 5001 to container port 80 for the 'vote' service.
Inspected data/docker-compose.yml which maps host port 5002 to container port 80 for the 'result' service.

privileged_info_summary: The task deploys the real Docker Example Voting App using a provided docker-compose.yml file. Analysis of this configuration file confirms it defines exactly 5 services (vote, result, worker, redis, and db) that will run as 5 containers. The configuration correctly maps the vote service's web interface to host port 5001 and the result service's web interface to host port 5002.
